overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a black coat and hat walking through a rainy rural farm setting. The character traverses muddy dirt paths past wooden farmhouses, a cow pen, and climbs onto a covered porch to survey the stormy landscape.

events.description: approaching wooden fence enclosing grazing cows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy road past weathered wooden farm buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy dirt road in heavy rain, passing a weathered wooden building on the left while approaching a fenced cow pen. The landscape features telegraph poles and a distant industrial chimney against a grey stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between farmhouse and livestock fence

events.description: passing clothesline with white laundry hanging between posts

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path between the farmhouse wall and the cow pasture fence

notable_agents.action: cows continuing to graze in the fenced pasture

entered.detail: wooden posts with white sheets and laundry hanging to dry
pile of burlap sacks against the farmhouse wall
weathered wooden barrels near the farmhouse corner

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow path between the main farmhouse on the right and the cow pasture on the left, passing a clothesline with hanging laundry and farming supplies like sacks and barrels stacked against the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse side path approaching covered porch

events.description: climbing wooden stairs onto the farmhouse porch

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs onto the covered porch of the farmhouse

notable_agents.action: horse tied to a post near the porch entrance

overhanging wooden roof providing shelter from rain
wooden rocking chair on the porch deck

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the side of the farmhouse, passing the back corner and approaching the porch entrance. The character climbs the wooden stairs onto the covered porch where a rocking chair sits, while a horse is tied nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered farmhouse porch overlooking rural landscape

events.description: stopping at porch railing to observe the rainy landscape

agents.ego_description: standing on the porch looking out at the stormy rural landscape and distant road

entered.detail: weathered wooden railing along the porch edge
muddy track leading through the open fields
small wooden building visible across the fields

segments.scene_description: Now sheltered under the porch roof, the character stands at the railing observing the heavy rain falling on the rural landscape. The view extends across muddy fields to distant farm buildings and utility poles, with the storm continuing to pour down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched farmstead that transitions from an open muddy road to the sheltered vantage point of a porch. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path in heavy rain, passing a weathered wooden building and a fenced cow pen under a grey, stormy sky. As the character proceeds, the path narrows between a main farmhouse and the pasture, moving past hanging laundry and stacked barrels. The scene then shifts as the character rounds the back corner of the house and climbs the wooden stairs, passing a tied horse to reach a covered porch with a rocking chair. Finally, the camera settles under the roof, looking out from the railing across the muddy fields and distant utility poles as the storm continues to pour down.
